subcodes.first_line: It hath been ordained aforetime that should any soul desire to attain unto the knowledge of Truth, he must needs cast aside all veils [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از قبل فرموده اند در وصف حقیقت اگر نفسی اراده عرفانش داشته باشد باید سبحات
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
